member.name: T:TransactionResponse
member.summary:
When the client sends the node a transaction of any kind, the node replies with this, which simply says that the transaction passed the pre-check (so the node will submit it to the network) or it failed (so it won't). To learn the consensus result, the client should later obtain a receipt (free), or can buy a more detailed record (not free).
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: F:TransactionResponse.MAX_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
member.summary: The maximum number of retry attempts for throttled transactions

member.name: F:TransactionResponse.INITIAL_BACKOFF_MS
member.summary: The initial backoff delay in milliseconds

member.name: F:TransactionResponse.MAX_BACKOFF_MS
member.summary: The maximum backoff delay in milliseconds

member.name: F:TransactionResponse.NodeId
member.summary: The node ID

member.name: F:TransactionResponse.TransactionHash
member.summary: The transaction hash

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.#ctor(AccountId,TransactionId,System.Byte[],TransactionId,System.Func{Client,TransactionResponse,TransactionReceipt})
member.summary: The transaction ID

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.#ctor(AccountId,TransactionId,System.Byte[],TransactionId,System.Func{Client,TransactionResponse,TransactionReceipt})_2
member.summary: The scheduled transaction ID

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.#ctor(AccountId,TransactionId,System.Byte[],TransactionId,System.Func{Client,TransactionResponse,TransactionReceipt})_3
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: the node id
the transaction id
the transaction hash
the scheduled transaction id

member.name: P:TransactionResponse.ValidateStatus
member.returns: whether getReceipt() or getRecord() will throw an exception if the receipt status is not SUCCESS

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceipt(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceipt(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptQuery
member.summary: Create receipt query from the {@link #transactionId} and {@link #transactionHash}

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.returns: future result of the transaction receipt

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionReceipt,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionReceipt,System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionReceipt},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:TransactionResponse.GetReceiptAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionReceipt},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Fetch the receipt of the transaction asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt

member.summary: Fetch the record of the transaction.

The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the receipt
